modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Excel files are not opening correctly in Office365.

full_description_text:  
- The user was trying to open Excel files in Office365.  
- They reported that the files are not displaying properly.  
- This issue seems to be affecting their ability to work efficiently.  
- The user mentioned they are using Microsoft Office 2013.
short_description: Excel files are not opening correctly in Office365.
description:
